Part.Source:
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmPCod, &FiLCod, domConfSistema.Tcon020_ClientePadraoVista, &Tcon020_ClientePadraoVista) &VistaPedCliCod = val(&Tcon020_ClientePadraoVista) &atualizarDatas = 'S' Do Case Case &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or &PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO //FECHAR/SEPARAR PEDIDO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedCLiCod = PedCliCod
&LctAtuEst = LctAtuEst &LctAtuSal = LctAtuSal &LctAtuPro = LctAtuPro &LctTip = LctTip &LctGerFin = LctGerFin
If PedDtaFat.IsEmpty() or PedDtaFat.IsNull() &PedDtaFat = PedDtaSep Else &PedDtaFat = PedDtaFat EndIF
if &PedDtaFat = serverdate() &atualizarDatas = 'N' Endif
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod //Atualiza &auxCount += 1 If &auxCount > 10 and &Total > 0 &Count += 1 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) &auxCount = 0
If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf &ProgressLogXml = &Pgmname + ' ' + ProRef do 'Atualiza' EndIF //Atualiza
&ProCod = PedProEstProCod
&ProGraCod = PedProEstProGraCod If ProGraCod = 0 OR PedProEstProGraCod = 0 &ProGraCod = 1 prcAtualizaProGraCodZero.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF
&PedQtd = PedQtd &PedVlrCus = PedVlrCus
If ProEstTip <> TipoEstoque.NAO_ATUALIZA do 'FechaEstoque' EndiF if &PedCLiCod <> &VistaPedCliCod //Venda a vista nao precisa do 'FechaEstoqueCliente' Endif
if ProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR //CONTROLA LOTE For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod, PedProEstLotCod &EstLotCod = PedProEstLotCod &EstLotFab = PedProEstLotFab &EstLotVct = PedProEstLotVct &PedProEstLotQtd = PedProEstLotQtd &PedProEstLotGer = PedProEstLotGer &PedProEstLotPen = PedProEstLotPen &PedProEstLotPms = PedProEstLotPms &PedProEstLotPur = PedProEstLotPur &PedProEstLotRen = PedProEstLotRen do 'FechaEstoqueProdutoLote' EndFor Endif
EndFor EndFor
Case &PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO //CANCELA PEDIDO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
if PedStsGer = Pedido_gerado.OrdemCarregamento &PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef Endif
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod //Atualiza &auxCount += 1 If &auxCount > 10 and &Total > 0 &Count += 1 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) &auxCount = 0 If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf &ProgressLogXml = &Pgmname + ' ' + ProRef do 'Atualiza' EndIF //Atualiza
&ProGraCod = PedProEstProGraCod If ProGraCod = 0 OR PedProEstProGraCod = 0 &ProGraCod = 1 prcAtualizaProGraCodZero.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF
AtualizaEstoqueFormulas.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedProEstProCod, &ProGraCod) if &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueFormulas.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedProEstProCod, 1) Endif EndFor EndFor
if &PedCodOciRef > 0 AtualizaVendaFutura.Call(&EmPCod, &FiLCod, &PedCodOciRef, VendaFutura.BloqueiaVendaFutura) EndiF
Case &PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO //ABRE PEDIDO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
if PedStsGer = Pedido_gerado.OrdemCarregamento &PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef Endif
&PedDtaFat = PedDtaFat
&PedCLiCod = PedCliCod
&LctAtuEst = LctAtuEst &LctAtuSal = LctAtuSal &LctAtuPro = LctAtuPro &LctTip = LctTip &LctGerFin = LctGerFin
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod //Atualiza &auxCount += 1 If &auxCount > 10 and &Total > 0 &Count += 1 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) &auxCount = 0 If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf &ProgressLogXml = &Pgmname + ' ' + ProRef do 'Atualiza' EndIF
//Atualiza
&ProCod = PedProEstProCod
&ProGraCod = PedProEstProGraCod If ProGraCod = 0 OR PedProEstProGraCod = 0 &ProGraCod = 1 prcAtualizaProGraCodZero.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF
&PedQtd = PedQtd &PedVlrCus = PedVlrCus
do 'AbreEstoque' if &PedCLiCod <> &VistaPedCliCod //Venda a vista nao precisa do 'AbreEstoqueCliente' Endif
if ProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod, PedProEstLotCod &EstLotCod = PedProEstLotCod &EstLotFab = PedProEstLotFab &EstLotVct = PedProEstLotVct &PedProEstLotQtd = PedProEstLotQtd &PedProEstLotGer = PedProEstLotGer &PedProEstLotPen = PedProEstLotPen &PedProEstLotPms = PedProEstLotPms &PedProEstLotPur = PedProEstLotPur &PedProEstLotRen = PedProEstLotRen do 'AbreEstoqueProdutoLote' EndFor Endif EndFor EndFor
if &PedCodOciRef > 0 AtualizaVendaFutura.Call(&EmPCod, &FiLCod, &PedCodOciRef, VendaFutura.BloqueiaVendaFutura) EndiF EndCase
commit
sub 'AbreEstoqueProdutoLote' Do Case Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &EstLotQtdEnt = 0 &EstLotQtdSai = &PedProEstLotQtd prcAtualizaEstoqueProdutoLote.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &EstLotCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '+', &EstLotQtdEnt, &EstLotQtdSai, &EstLotVct,&EstLotFab, &PedDtaFat,&PedProEstLotGer,&PedProEstLotPen,&PedProEstLotPms,&PedProEstLotPur,&PedProEstLotRen)
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &EstLotQtdEnt = &PedProEstLotQtd &EstLotQtdSai = 0
prcAtualizaEstoqueProdutoLote.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &EstLotCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '-', &EstLotQtdEnt, &EstLotQtdSai, &EstLotVct,&EstLotFab, &PedDtaFat,&PedProEstLotGer,&PedProEstLotPen,&PedProEstLotPms,&PedProEstLotPur,&PedProEstLotRen) EndCase EndSub
Sub 'AbreEstoqueCliente'
if &LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores Do Case Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida or (&LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim) Do Case Case &LctAtuEst <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = 0 &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Otherwise &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = 0 EndCase prcAtualizaEstoqueCliente.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCLiCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '-', &EstCliTipCmp, &EstCliTipRet, &PedDtaFat)
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada or (&LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim) Do Case Case &LctAtuEst <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = 0 &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Otherwise &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = 0 EndCase prcAtualizaEstoqueCliente.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCLiCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '+', &EstCliTipCmp, &EstCliTipRet, &PedDtaFat) EndCase EndiF EndSub
Sub 'AbreEstoque' //ATUALIZA ESTOQUE Do CAse CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //EMPRESA ENTRADA If &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod,1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '-', &atualizarDatas) EndIF AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod,&ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '-', &atualizarDatas)
CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //EMPRESA SAIDA If &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod,1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '+', &atualizarDatas) EndIF AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod,&ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '+', &atualizarDatas) EndCAse
//ATUALIZA PRODUCAO Do CAse CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //PRODUCAO ENTRADA If &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-') EndIF AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-')
CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //PRODUCAO SAIDA If &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+') EndIF AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+') EndCAse EndSub
sub 'FechaEstoqueProdutoLote' Do Case Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &EstLotQtdEnt = 0 &EstLotQtdSai = &PedProEstLotQtd prcAtualizaEstoqueProdutoLote.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &EstLotCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '-', &EstLotQtdEnt, &EstLotQtdSai, &EstLotVct,&EstLotFab, &PedDtaFat,&PedProEstLotGer,&PedProEstLotPen,&PedProEstLotPms,&PedProEstLotPur,&PedProEstLotRen)
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &EstLotQtdEnt = &PedProEstLotQtd &EstLotQtdSai = 0 prcAtualizaEstoqueProdutoLote.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &EstLotCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '+', &EstLotQtdEnt, &EstLotQtdSai, &EstLotVct,&EstLotFab, &PedDtaFat,&PedProEstLotGer,&PedProEstLotPen,&PedProEstLotPms,&PedProEstLotPur,&PedProEstLotRen) EndCase EndSub
Sub 'FechaEstoqueCliente' if &LctTip <> TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores Do Case Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida or (&LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim) Do Case Case &LctAtuEst <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = 0 &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Otherwise &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = 0 EndCase prcAtualizaEstoqueCliente.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCLiCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '+', &EstCliTipCmp, &EstCliTipRet, &PedDtaFat)
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada or (&LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim) Do Case Case &LctAtuEst <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Case &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum and &LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &EstCliTipRet = 0 &EstCliTipCmp = &PedQtd
Otherwise &EstCliTipRet = &PedQtd &EstCliTipCmp = 0 EndCase
prcAtualizaEstoqueCliente.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCLiCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, '-', &EstCliTipCmp, &EstCliTipRet, &PedDtaFat) EndCase Endif EndSub
Sub 'FechaEstoque' //ATUALIZA ESTOQUE Do CAse CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //EMPRESA ENTRADA If &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '+', &atualizarDatas) EndIF AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '+', &atualizarDatas)
CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //EMPRESA SAIDA if &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '-', &atualizarDatas) EndIf AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LctTip, '-', &atualizarDatas) EndCase
Do CAse CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //PRODUCAO ENTRADA If &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+') EndIF AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+')
CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //PRODUCAO SAIDA if &ProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-') EndIF AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-') EndCase EndSub
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &ProgressLogXml Exit endfor
commit EndSub
parm(in:&ProgressId, inout:&Total, inout:&Count, in:&EmpCod, in:&FiLCod, in:&PedCod, in:&PedSts);
